title: Freedom Convoy
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Freedom Convoy''' was a group of freedom fighters that rose to power during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], when they launched a campaign to free female [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] slaves from the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{Mo}}
